content:
Hi Dougmet

Your screen shot shows 4 accounts. Dougmet666 is possibly duplicated. The others are not.

Two text labels are displayed for each account. 1. A user definable account name. 2. The account's email address.

Having the account name and email address the same may be confusing.

To change the name of each account, navigate to: 1. Settings > account > general settings 2. Tap "Account name" 3. Type something new, e.g BTInternet, Gmail, Personal, Work etc

To delete an account, navigate to ... 1. Setting > account 2. Tap the 3 dot menu (top right of screen) 3. Tap remove account
